title: The magic behind GenLatte: Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini
summary: GenLatte is a demo showcased at Google Cloud Next 2026 that uses Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini to generate dynamic, personalized user interfaces and images on demand. The application leverages agentic features and Agent-to-UI architecture to co-create customized latte art in real time.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video breaks down GenLatte, a demo shown at Google Cloud Next 2026 that combines Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini to generate dynamic, personalized user interfaces and images on demand. The walkthrough covers how the app uses agentic features and an Agent-to-UI architecture to co-create customized latte art in real time. Key takeaways center on agent orchestration and how generated UI is assembled and rendered through the Flutter and Firebase stack.
